sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Infovista recognized in the 2025 Gartner® Market Guide for CSP Service and Network Assurance Solutions
feed.summary: The article mentions that Infovista has been recognized in the 2025 Gartner Market Guide for CSP Service and Network Assurance Solutions. This recognition highlights Infovista's position in the market for communication service provider offerings related to service and network assurance.

feed.title: Clean Eatz Kitchen to Appear on QVC Tuesday with Cauliflower Crust Personal Pizzas
feed.summary: Clean Eatz Kitchen, a healthy frozen meal company, will be featured on QVC's "Gourmet Holiday" segment on Tuesday, January 13, 2026. Co-founder Evonne Varady will present their cauliflower crust personal pizzas, available in four varieties, offering a convenient and protein-packed alternative to traditional pizza. The pizzas will be offered at a special price of $59.98 with free shipping and handling during the QVC appearance.

feed.title: Capital One Q4 earnings miss as credit loss provision, expenses climb (COF:NYSE)
feed.summary: Capital One (COF) reported weaker-than-expected Q4 earnings, with adjusted EPS missing analyst estimates and GAAP EPS below the previous quarter. The miss was attributed to increased expenses and higher provisions for credit losses, partly due to the acquisition of Discover Financial. While the Discover acquisition boosted revenue and net interest income, it also incurred significant costs related to intangible amortization and integration.

feed.title: Intuitive Surgical Stock Climbs After Company Tops Q4 Earnings
feed.summary: Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) reported strong financial results for the fourth quarter, surpassing analyst expectations for both revenue and earnings per share. The company saw a 19% increase in total revenue year-over-year, driven by significant growth in da Vinci procedure volumes and system placements. Looking ahead, Intuitive Surgical anticipates continued growth in da Vinci procedures for 2026.

feed.title: NiSource declares $0.30 quarterly dividend payable in February
feed.summary: NiSource Inc. has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.30 per share, payable on February 20, 2026, to stockholders of record as of February 3, 2026. The utility company has a history of 39 consecutive years of dividend payments and 9 years of increases, with a current yield of 2.56%. This announcement follows strong financial performance and positive analyst ratings, partly due to growth potential from data center development.

feed.title: Jabil declares $0.08 quarterly dividend payable in March
feed.summary: Jabil Inc. has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.08 per share, payable on March 3, 2026, to shareholders of record as of February 17, 2026. This continues the company's consistent dividend payments since 2006, supported by an annual dividend yield of 0.13% and aggressive share buybacks. The announcement follows strategic moves including the pricing of $1 billion in senior notes, the acquisition of Hanley Energy Group, and a minority investment in Eagle Harbor Technologies.

feed.title: Jabil appoints Steve Raymund as chairman, adds two board members
feed.summary: Jabil Inc. has appointed Steve Raymund as Chairman of its Board of Directors and added Thomas T. Edman and Raejeanne Skillern as new board members. Raymund, a long-serving director and former CEO of Tech Data, expressed honor in his new role, while the new additions bring expertise in critical capabilities and end-markets as Jabil celebrates its 60th anniversary. This announcement comes alongside recent financial activities including senior note offerings, an acquisition, dividend declarations, and a strategic partnership, reflecting Jabil's efforts to strengthen its market position.

feed.title: Capital One Stock Slides On Q4 Earnings Miss, Purchase Of Brex
feed.summary: Capital One Financial (NYSE: COF) shares dropped after missing Q4 earnings estimates, reporting $3.86 per share against an expected $4.11. Despite beating revenue estimates with $15.58 billion, the company announced the acquisition of fintech company Brex Inc. for $5.15 billion. The stock fell 4.42% in extended trading following the report.

feed.title: Congress grills UnitedHealth CEO Stephen Hemsley on claim denials, insurance costs
feed.summary: UnitedHealth Group CEO Stephen Hemsley faced a bipartisan grilling from the U.S. House Energy and Commerce Committee regarding claim denials, high insurance costs, and executive pay. Lawmakers questioned whether the company's massive size contributes to unaffordability, pushing back on Hemsley's assertion that rising healthcare costs are the primary driver. The hearing also touched upon the controversy surrounding pharmacy benefit managers (PBMs) and an earlier stock sell-off UnitedHealth experienced.

feed.title: Deere’s finance chief Joshua Jepsen to join Honeywell’s aerospace unit By Reuters
feed.summary: Joshua Jepsen, the chief financial officer of Deere & Co., will be stepping down from his role on February 19 to join Honeywell's aerospace unit as its CFO starting February 23. Deere has appointed Ryan Campbell as the interim finance chief while they search for a permanent replacement.

feed.title: Fortinet Firewalls Hit With Malicious Configuration Changes
feed.summary: Arctic Wolf Labs has observed malicious activity targeting Fortinet firewalls through single sign-on (SSO) logins, leading to unauthorized configuration changes and exfiltration of firewall configuration files. This activity, suspected to be automated, is similar to a previous campaign following the disclosure of critical Fortinet vulnerabilities (CVE-2025-59718 and CVE-2025-59719). Concerns have been raised that patches for these vulnerabilities may not have fully mitigated the threat, with reports of compromises on supposedly updated devices.

feed.title: Clorox to Acquire GOJO, Expanding Hygiene Portfolio
feed.summary: Clorox announced an agreement to acquire GOJO Industries, the maker of Purell, for $2.25 billion in cash. This acquisition aims to expand Clorox's presence in health and hygiene, particularly in B2B and retail channels, by leveraging GOJO's strong distribution network and recurring revenue base. Clorox anticipates at least $50 million in cost synergies, expecting the deal to be accretive to growth, adjusted EBITDA margins, and adjusted EPS in the second year, while reaffirming its fiscal 2026 outlook.

feed.title: WEC Energy's longest-serving CEO retires as first Chairman Emeritus
feed.summary: WEC Energy Group announced the retirement of its longest-serving CEO, Gale Klappa, from the board after the May annual meeting. Klappa will be named Chairman Emeritus, a first for the company. Scott Lauber, the current president and CEO, is slated to become chairman, continuing a legacy of 23 consecutive years of dividend increases and sustained earnings growth.

feed.title: RXNT Recognized as a 2026 Gartner Digital Markets Leader Across Five Categories, Highlighting Excellence in Ambulatory Healthcare Software
feed.summary: RXNT, a Maryland-based ambulatory healthcare technology company, has been recognized as a 2026 Gartner Digital Markets Leader, earning five Shortlist and five FrontRunner awards. These accolades highlight RXNT's excellence in Medical Billing, Practice Management, Electronic Medical Records software, and specialized solutions for Mental Health and Physical Therapy. The recognition is based on data-driven methodologies and trusted user reviews on Gartner Digital Markets' platforms, reinforcing RXNT's commitment to customer satisfaction and innovative, AI-powered software.

feed.title: Cisco’s Zero-Day RCE Nightmare: UC Flaw Sparks Urgent Patching Frenzy
feed.summary: Cisco has issued urgent patches for a zero-day remote code execution (RCE) flaw (CVE-2026-20045) in its Unified Communications suite, which is under active exploitation. The vulnerability, rated 9.8 CVSS, allows unauthenticated attackers to gain root access to affected systems without user interaction. Organizations are advised to apply version-specific updates immediately and implement robust mitigation strategies, including firewalls and continuous monitoring, to protect against potential compromises.

feed.title: Microsoft: Cloud Margins Are The Tripwire Heading Into FQ2 Earnings (Downgrade) (MSFT)
feed.summary: The author is downgrading Microsoft Corporation (MSFT) to a Hold before its FQ2 2026 earnings due to concerns about a cautious FQ3 margin guide in the Cloud segment, driven by depreciation hikes and potentially high CapEx. Despite a recent selloff, attributed to sentiment rather than deteriorating fundamentals, the author believes the market might not react positively to these margin pressures. Street EPS and revenue projections for the next 12 months remain unchanged since the last quarter, despite general pessimism in the software infrastructure industry.

feed.title: BNY to Speak at the BofA Securities Financial Services Conference
feed.summary: BNY (The Bank of New York Mellon Corporation) announced that its Chief Financial Officer, Dermot McDonogh, will speak at the BofA Securities Financial Services Conference in Miami, Florida on February 11, 2026, at 12:10 p.m. ET. A live webcast and an archived version of the audio will be available on the BNY investor relations website. BNY highlights its role as a global financial services platform, managing $59.3 trillion in assets under custody and/or administration and $2.2 trillion in assets under management as of December 31, 2025.

feed.title: Autodesk Inc. stock outperforms competitors on strong trading day
feed.summary: Autodesk Inc. (ADSK) shares rose 4.79% to $269.77 on Thursday, outperforming its competitors and the broader market. This marked the second consecutive day of gains for the company's stock, as the S&P 500 and Dow Jones Industrial Average also saw increases.

feed.title: Perimeter Solutions completes acquisition of MMT for $685 million
feed.summary: Perimeter Solutions has completed the acquisition of Medical Manufacturing Technologies (MMT) for approximately $685 million in cash. This strategic move expands Perimeter's presence into the medical technology sector, complementing its existing fire safety and specialty chemical businesses. The acquisition was financed through cash on hand and a $550 million senior secured notes offering, with analysts projecting continued profitability for Perimeter Solutions.

feed.title: Terns Pharmaceuticals amends license agreement with Hansoh for TERN-701 rights
feed.summary: Terns Pharmaceuticals has amended its license agreement with Hansoh (Shanghai) Healthtech Co., Ltd. for TERN-701, a therapeutic product for oncology indications. The new amendment grants Terns Pharmaceuticals exclusive worldwide rights, excluding the Hansoh Territory, to patents and applications related to TERN-701, replacing a previous non-exclusive license. Terns will pay a one-time upfront fee of $1 million and tiered royalties on net sales, reinforcing its strong financial position and recent positive clinical and financial developments.

feed.title: J.B. Hunt joins Triumph Network for automated payment solutions
feed.summary: J.B. Hunt Transport Services (NASDAQ:JBHT) has partnered with Triumph (NYSE:TFIN) to integrate automated payment solutions, aiming to streamline carrier payment cycles within its transportation network. This collaboration enhances J.B. Hunt's operational efficiency and expands the reach of Triumph's payment ecosystem, which focuses on modernizing freight transactions. The announcement follows J.B. Hunt's strong fourth-quarter earnings and a recent dividend increase, reflecting the company's robust market position.

feed.title: Invitation Homes Announces Tax Treatment of 2025 Dividends
feed.summary: Invitation Homes Inc. announced the tax treatment of its 2025 dividends for its Common Stock, providing a detailed table summarizing cash distributions, taxable dividends, capital gain distributions, and other tax-related figures per share. The company advises stockholders to consult their own tax advisors regarding federal, state, and local taxation of these dividends as the disclosed information is based on the best available data prior to the 2025 tax return filing. Invitation Homes, an S&P 500 company, is a leading single-family home leasing and management company.

feed.title: Fifth Third Bancorp stock underperforms Thursday when compared to competitors
feed.summary: Fifth Third Bancorp (FITB) stock fell 3.73% to $50.89 on Thursday, despite a generally positive trading day for the broader market, with the S&P 500 and Dow Jones Industrial Average both rising. The decline broke a five-day winning streak for the company's shares. This performance indicates that Fifth Third Bancorp underperformed its competitors during the trading session.

feed.title: Deere's finance chief Joshua Jepsen to join Honeywell's aerospace unit
feed.summary: Joshua Jepsen, Deere & Co.'s chief financial officer, will resign from his position effective February 19. He is set to join Honeywell's aerospace unit as its CFO from February 23. Deere has appointed Ryan Campbell as interim finance chief while the company searches for a permanent replacement.

feed.title: First look: CSX Q4 earnings
feed.summary: CSX Corp. reported fourth-quarter 2025 operating income of $1.11 billion and net earnings of $720 million, or $0.39 per share, missing analyst estimates. Revenue was $3.51 billion, down 1% year-over-year, due to lower merchandise volume and reduced export coal revenue despite gains in pricing and intermodal volume. The company expects improved financial performance in 2026 by focusing on productivity, cost control, and capital discipline.

feed.title: Clorox to acquire Purell maker GOJO Industries for $2.25 billion
feed.summary: The Clorox Company announced its definitive agreement to acquire GOJO Industries, the maker of Purell hand sanitizer, for $2.25 billion in cash. This acquisition, which includes significant tax benefits, aims to expand Clorox's presence in the health and hygiene sector and is expected to be accretive to its adjusted earnings per share in the second year. Clorox plans to fund the transaction primarily through debt financing, with the deal projected to close by the end of its fiscal year 2026, subject to regulatory approval.

feed.title: Rollins declares quarterly cash dividend of $0.1825 per share
feed.summary: Rollins, Inc. announced a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.1825 per share, maintaining its 55-year streak of dividend payments and marking its 23rd consecutive year of dividend increases. The dividend is payable on March 10, 2026, to shareholders of record by February 25, 2026. This announcement comes amid recent positive analyst updates, with several firms upgrading ratings and raising price targets for the pest control services company, reflecting strong growth potential and financial health.

feed.title: QS Stock Price, News & Analysis | Quantumscape
feed.summary: QuantumScape Corporation (QS) is focused on developing next-generation solid-state lithium-metal battery technology for electric vehicles, emphasizing higher energy density, faster charging, and enhanced safety. The company employs a technology licensing and partnership model, expanding collaborations with entities like PowerCo and major automakers, and has progressed on its Eagle Line pilot production and Cobra separator process. QuantumScape has also announced its intention to transfer its stock listing from the NYSE to Nasdaq.

feed.title: Wisconsin Electric Declares $0.90 Cash Dividend Per Share
feed.summary: Wisconsin Electric, a subsidiary of WEC Energy Group, has declared a cash dividend of $0.90 per share on its Preferred Stock, payable March 1, 2026, and an additional $1.50 per share on its Six Percent Preferred Stock, payable April 30, 2026. These dividends reinforce the company's shareholder return strategy and its stable market position serving over 1.1 million electric and 490,000 natural gas customers. Wall Street analysts currently forecast a potential rise in WEC stock price over the next 12 months, with an average target of $120.15.

feed.title: The Law Offices of Frank R. Cruz Announces Investigation of Synopsys, Inc. (SNPS) on Behalf of Investors
feed.summary: The Law Offices of Frank R. Cruz has initiated an investigation into potential breaches of fiduciary duties by the board of directors of Synopsys, Inc. (SNPS). This follows Synopsys's third-quarter 2025 financial results, which reported that its "IP business underperformed expectations," including missing revenue guidance and a significant year-over-year decline in net income and the Design IP segment. Consequently, Synopsys's stock price dropped substantially, leading to the investigation on behalf of shareholders who purchased shares before December 2024.

feed.title: General Electric (GE) Reports Strong Q4 2025 Performance
feed.summary: General Electric (GE) reported a strong Q4 2025 performance, with a 74% increase in orders and a 20% rise in revenue for its GE Aerospace division. The company is strategically investing over $1 billion in MRO, focusing on LEAP capacity expansion, and exhibits robust financial health with a strong Altman Z-Score of 3.41. Despite positive analyst sentiment and strong market positioning, investors are advised to be vigilant of sector-specific risks and market volatility, as indicated by moderate beta and insider selling.

feed.title: CSX shares leap 6% after posting Q4 earnings beat despite subdued demand environment
feed.summary: CSX Corp. (NASDAQ:CSX) reported fourth-quarter earnings that surpassed analyst expectations, causing its shares to rise by 4% after hours. Despite a challenging industrial environment, the railroad operator achieved adjusted earnings per share of $0.42, exceeding the $0.41 estimate, though revenue of $3.51 billion slightly missed the $3.55 billion consensus. The company cited a strong operational foundation and plans for improved financial performance in 2026 through productivity, cost control, and capital discipline.

feed.title: CSX shares leap 6% after posting Q4 earnings beat despite subdued demand environment
feed.summary: CSX Corp. reported better-than-expected adjusted earnings per share of $0.42 for Q4 2025, surpassing analyst estimates, which caused its shares to jump 4% after hours. Despite a challenging industrial environment and a slight revenue miss, the company's Q4 results and full-year performance showcased operational strength. CEO Steve Angel emphasized productivity, cost control, and capital discipline as key drivers for improved financial performance in 2026.

feed.title: How To Win Deals In A Competitive Market, With Merck & Co. BD Exec Elizabeth Naldi-Jacob
feed.summary: Elizabeth Naldi-Jacob, a Business Development Executive at Merck & Co., highlights the company's strategic approach to deals in a competitive market. Merck anticipates two major transactions in 2025 and potentially more in 2026, ranging from early-stage licensing to significant M&A. This article provides insights into winning deals in the current pharmaceutical landscape.

feed.title: A drag queen bids farewell to Williams-Sonoma’s flagship store in San Francisco
feed.summary: Juanita MORE!, a prominent drag queen, reflects on the closing of the Williams-Sonoma flagship store in San Francisco, sharing personal memories of working there and meeting its founder, Chuck Williams. She highlights the store's community impact, its role in her life, and Chuck Williams's legacy as an LGBTQ+ advocate. The article also touches on the changing retail landscape in Union Square.

feed.title: The Truth About CarMax Inc: Why Everyone Is Suddenly Paying Attention
feed.summary: This article examines the current buzz around CarMax Inc., discussing whether the company offers true value to consumers or is simply benefiting from strong marketing. It covers CarMax's online convenience, fixed-price model, and extensive inventory, comparing it to rivals like Carvana. The piece also touches on the CarMax stock (KMX) and advises potential buyers and sellers to use CarMax as one data point in their car transaction strategy, emphasizing value in reduced stress rather than always the lowest price.

feed.title: Leidos Partners with OpenAI to Enhance Government Efficiency
feed.summary: Leidos is partnering with OpenAI to integrate advanced AI technology into government agency workflows, focusing on digital modernization, health services, and national security. This collaboration aims to boost efficiency and accelerate product development by applying OpenAI's generative and agentic AI models to Leidos' internal systems. The partnership emphasizes trust and security in AI adoption, contributing to Leidos' NorthStar 2030 strategy and driving growth in the government market.

feed.title: How Southern homeowners can avoid burst pipes and insurance claims
feed.summary: Mercury Insurance (NYSE:MCY) has released a new homeowner preparedness guide for Southern states to help residents protect their homes from winter storms. The guide offers practical tips for exterior and interior home readiness, safe travel, and understanding insurance policies to prevent damage and reduce claims. This initiative by Mercury Insurance aims to mitigate losses and disruptions in regions increasingly affected by severe cold weather.

feed.title: KKR to Present at the 2026 UBS Financial Services Conference
feed.summary: KKR & Co. Inc. announced that its Chief Financial Officer, Robert H. Lewin, will present at the 2026 UBS Financial Services Conference on February 9, 2026, at 1:00 PM ET. A live webcast of the presentation will be available on KKR's Investor Center website, with a replay accessible shortly after the event. KKR is a global investment firm specializing in alternative asset management, capital markets, and insurance solutions.

feed.title: Intuitive Surgical shares jump after beating Q4 expectations
feed.summary: Intuitive Surgical Inc. (ISRG) reported strong Q4 earnings, surpassing analyst expectations with adjusted EPS of $2.53 and revenue of $2.87 billion, a 19% increase year-over-year. The company's performance was boosted by significant growth in da Vinci and Ion procedures, leading to a 1.3% jump in shares after hours. Intuitive Surgical also provided a positive outlook for 2026, projecting continued procedure growth and a healthy financial position with $9.03 billion in cash.

feed.title: Clorox buys GOJO Industries, the makers of Purell
feed.summary: The Clorox Co. has announced its acquisition of GOJO Industries, the maker of Purell, for $2.25 billion in cash. This strategic move aims to expand Clorox's presence in the health and hygiene sector, leveraging GOJO's strong position in skin health and hand hygiene solutions, particularly its number one share in hand sanitizer across B2B and retail channels. The acquisition is expected to scale Clorox's fastest-growing segment, Health and Wellness, and drive long-term shareholder value.

feed.title: Capital One to Buy Fintech Brex for $5.1 Billion in Cash, Stock
feed.summary: Capital One Financial Corp. has agreed to acquire Brex, a fintech company specializing in corporate expense management and accounting, for $5.15 billion. The deal will be split roughly 50% cash and 50% stock. This acquisition was announced alongside Capital One's fourth-quarter results.

feed.title: Kinetik boosts payout to $3.24 a year, sets Feb. 26 earnings call
feed.summary: Kinetik Holdings Inc. announced a 4% increase in its quarterly cash dividend to $0.81 per share, totaling $3.24 annually. The dividend is payable on February 13, 2026, to shareholders of record as of February 6, 2026. The company also scheduled its fourth-quarter 2025 earnings conference call for February 26, 2026, following its earnings release on February 25, 2026.

feed.title: NiSource Declares Common Stock Dividend
feed.summary: NiSource Inc. (NYSE: NI) announced that its board of directors declared a quarterly common stock dividend of $0.30 cents per share. This dividend is payable on February 20, 2026, to stockholders of record as of the close of business on February 3, 2026. NiSource is a major regulated utility company serving natural gas and electric customers across six states.

feed.title: Ryman Hospitality CEO, CFO to detail strategy at two March investor conferences
feed.summary: Ryman Hospitality Properties (NYSE: RHP) will participate in two institutional investor conferences in early March 2026, where CEO Mark Fioravanti and CFO Jennifer Hutcheson will present on company strategy and financial performance. The presentations will occur at the Raymond James conference on March 2nd and the Citi Global Property CEO Conference on March 3rd, with webcasts available for both events. The news highlights Ryman's engagement with investors and historically positive responses to promotional and earnings-related announcements.

feed.title: Ryman Hospitality Properties, Inc. Announces Participation in Upcoming Institutional Investor Conferences
feed.summary: Ryman Hospitality Properties, Inc. (NYSE: RHP) announced its participation in two upcoming institutional investor conferences: Raymond James & Associates’ 47th Annual Institutional Investors Conference and Citi’s 31st Annual Global Property CEO Conference. Mark Fioravanti, President and CEO, and Jennifer Hutcheson, Executive Vice President and CFO, will present the company's financial performance and business strategy. Webcasts of the presentations will be available on the company's website.

feed.title: Jabil Declares Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: Jabil Inc. announced that its Board of Directors has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.08 per share of common stock. The dividend will be paid on March 3, 2026, to shareholders of record as of February 17, 2026. Jabil has consistently paid quarterly cash dividends on its common shares since May 15, 2006.

feed.title: Jabil Announces Appointment of New Chairman, Directors to the Board
feed.summary: Jabil Inc. (NYSE: JBL) has announced the appointment of Steve Raymund as the new Chairman of its Board of Directors. The company also added Thomas T. Edman and Raejeanne Skillern to its Board, bringing significant expertise in electronics manufacturing, cloud, and data center industries, which are critical to Jabil's strategic direction. These appointments are expected to enhance Jabil's leadership as it continues to drive long-term value for stakeholders.

feed.title: FIS Appoints Anil Chakravarthy to the Board of Directors
feed.summary: FIS (NYSE: FIS) has announced the appointment of Anil Chakravarthy to its Board of Directors, increasing the board size to ten members, nine of whom are independent. Chakravarthy, currently President, Customer Experience Orchestration Business at Adobe, brings extensive experience in enterprise software, cloud transformation, and AI-powered solutions. His expertise is expected to be invaluable as FIS continues to innovate in financial technology and expand its capabilities.

feed.title: Capital One: Q4 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Capital One Financial Corp. reported fourth-quarter earnings of $2.13 billion, or $3.26 per share, which fell short of Wall Street expectations of $4.12 per share. The company's adjusted earnings were $3.86 per share. Revenue for the period was $19.8 billion, with adjusted revenue of $15.58 billion, surpassing analyst forecasts.
